ham-macaroni-salad.name: Ham Macaroni Salad

ingredients.item: Salt and ground black pepper to taste

instructions: Bring a large pot of lightly salted water to a boil. Cook elbow macaroni in the boiling water, stirring occasionally, until tender yet firm to the bite, about 8 minutes. Drain and rinse with cool water. Pat dry with a paper towel.
Combine pasta, ham, Cheddar cheese, celery, green onions, relish, mayonnaise, mustard, salt, and pepper in a bowl and mix well.

hand-cut-beef-chili-and-beans.name: Hand-cut Beef Chili And Beans
instructions: Heat enough olive oil in a large pot to cover the bottom of the pot over high heat; sear beef in hot oil in batches until completely browned, 5 to 7 minutes per batch. Remove browned beef with a slotted spoon to a bowl between batches.
Pour some olive oil into the pot with the browned bits of beef on the bottom; heat until shimmering. Saute onion and garlic in the hot oil until beginning to brown, 5 to 7 minutes.

Pour red wine into the pan and bring to a boil while scraping the browned bits of food off of the bottom of the pan with a wooden spoon. Cook until the wine reduces slightly in volume, about 5 minutes.

Pour tomato sauce, chili beans with sauce, white beans, black beans, and kidney beans into the pot; stir. Bring the mixture to a simmer and reduce heat to medium-low. Stir sea salt, cumin, black pepper, cayenne pepper, red pepper flakes, sugar, garlic powder, coriander, paprika, cinnamon, and nutmeg into the beef mixture. Cook until the beef is very tender, 2 to 3 hours.

harissa-and-lemon-pepper-wings.name: Harissa And Lemon-pepper Wings
instructions: Mix together lemon-pepper seasoning and 1 tablespoon harissa paste in a bowl. Pat dry the wings and place in a resealable plastic bag. Add seasoning mix, close bag, and shake, massaging the seasoning until every part of wings is well coated. Refrigerate for 1 hour or more.
Preheat the oven to 204°C (200 degrees C) and cover a large baking sheet with parchment paper.
Remove chicken wings from refrigerate and allow to come to room temperature while oven preheats.
Whisk remaining harissa paste and honey in a small bowl until fully mixed.
Place wings, meaty-sides up, on the prepared baking sheet, leaving at least 1 inch between each wing. Baste exposed sides with harissa-honey sauce.

Bake in the preheated oven for 15 minutes. Turn each wing and baste with remaining sauce. Bake until wings are cooked throughout and the internal temperature reaches 74°C (74 degrees C), 10 to 15 minutes more.
Set an oven rack about 6 inches from the heat source and turn on the oven's broiler. Crisp wings under the broiler for 1 to 2 minutes, if desired. Top with fresh lemon zest before serving.

hazelnut-roll-dessert-lezzet.name: Hazelnut Roll Dessert

5. Mix sugar and powder by adding.

7. Hazelnut dough u broadcast on the car.

9. Kelepç oil cake mold and roll horizontally caliba index.
10. Cook for 35 minutes in the oven set to 180 degrees.
11. 11. Serve your service.

healthy-chicken-salad.name: Healthy Chicken Salad

ingredients.prep: thinly sliced on a deep diagonal

ingredients.item: Of romaine or green or red leaf lettuce or 1 head of little gem lettuce
Big handful of cilantro leaves with tender stems

instructions: Bring chicken, 3 Tbsp. kosher salt, and 5 cups water to a bare simmer in a medium pot over medium heat (chicken should be submerged). Be patient—this will take a little while. Once liquid begins to simmer, reduce heat to low and cook (water should not be simmering at all now) until juices run clear when thickest part of chicken is pierced, 8–10 minutes. Transfer chicken to a medium bowl; discard poaching liquid. Let chicken cool slightly, then shred meat into big pieces; set aside.

Meanwhile, place scallions in a small bowl and pour in very cold water to cover; let soak 10 minutes. Drain scallions in a mesh sieve or colander, then rinse under cold running water, swishing vigorously to encourage them to curl up and to rinse off any scallion slime (ew). Shake off as much water as possible and place in a large bowl; set aside.

Working one at a time, slice cucumbers in half crosswise, then slice each piece in half lengthwise. Place quarters cut side down and slice in half lengthwise again to create 8 pieces total per cucumber. Add to bowl with reserved chicken.

Set 1 Tbsp. sesame seeds aside in a small bowl for serving. Crush remaining sesame seeds in a mortar and pestle until some of the seeds have turned to powder, but with plenty of whole seeds left. (Alternatively, if you’d rather spare yourself the elbow grease, pulse seeds a few times in a food processor or spice mill, then transfer to a medium bowl before proceeding). Add lime juice, tahini, soy sauce, honey, and red pepper flakes and mash to create a paste. Add ¼ cup water and whisk to combine (if you don’t have a small enough whisk, work in with the pestle). Taste and season with salt.

Add lettuce and cilantro to bowl with reserved scallions. Pour half of dressing over greens and toss to coat. Arrange on a platter. Pour remaining dressing over chicken and cucumbers, toss to coat, and arrange over greens. Top salad with reserved 1 Tbsp. sesame seeds and squeeze juice from lime half over.

herb-chard-and-feta-soup.name: Herb, Chard, And Feta Soup

ingredients.item: Swiss chard leaves (center ribs and stems removed) or spinach
Kosher salt and freshly ground black pepper
Kosher salt and freshly ground black pepper

instructions: Heat oil in a large saucepan over medium heat. Add onion and garlic and cook, stirring often, until translucent and soft (do not brown), 7–8 minutes. Stir in chard, broth, parsley, cilantro, fresh and dried mint, and nutmeg. Bring to a boil, reduce heat, and simmer, stirring occasionally, until chard is tender, about 10 minutes. Stir in lemon juice and season to taste with salt and pepper. Working in batches, purée soup in a blender until smooth. Return to pan. DO AHEAD: Can be made 8 hours ahead. Cover and chill. Rewarm soup before continuing.

Place 1/3 of yogurt in a medium bowl. Add 1/2 cup warm soup; whisk until smooth. Repeat process twice more, adding a total of 1 cup more soup. Whisk yogurt mixture into soup in saucepan. Stir 1/4 cup herbs and half of feta into soup. Season to taste with salt, pepper, and lemon juice, if desired.
Ladle soup into bowls and garnish with remaining 1/4 cup herbs and 2 oz. feta. Drizzle with oil, if desired.

hibiscus-orange-and-vanilla-agua-fresca.name: Hibiscus, Orange, And Vanilla Agua Fresca

ingredients.item: Dried hibiscus flowers or 24 hibiscus tea bags

instructions: Scrape vanilla seeds into a medium saucepan; add pod, chile, orange zest, hibiscus, sugar, and 2 cups boiling water.
Let steep until infusion cools to room temperature, about 30 minutes.
Strain through a fine-mesh sieve into a large bowl, pressing on solids.
Stir in lime juice and 2 cups cold water; chill agua fresca 1 hour.
Divide agua fresca among ice-filled glasses.
Garnish with lime wheels.
Agua fresca can be made 3 days ahead. Cover and chill.

honey-mustard-chicken-skillet.name: Honey Mustard Chicken Skillet

ingredients.prep: boneless chicken breasts, cut into bite-sized pieces

ingredients.item: Salt and ground black pepper to taste

instructions: Mix grainy mustard and honey together in a ceramic or glass bowl. Add chicken pieces and massage with marinade. Let sit to absorb flavors, about 30 minutes.

Heat oil in a cast iron skillet over medium-high heat. Add onion and saute until soft and translucent, about 5 minutes. Add garlic and 2 tablespoons honey Dijon mustard. Season with salt and pepper. Reduce heat to medium and saute until onion and garlic are browned, 3 to 4 minutes. If necessary, add 1 tablespoon of water during this process.
Add chicken to the skillet and remaining 2 tablespoons honey Dijon. Mix well and cover. Cook, stirring occasionally, until chicken is no longer pink in the centers, 7 to 10 minutes.
Uncover, increase heat, and reduce sauce until creamy and thick, 3 to 5 more minutes.

We'll place them in a big bowl or a pot, completely covered with water. The following day we will scold them and rinse them and place them into a big pot (that can be the same as where we have washed them but already washed and dry).
The next thing we're gonna do, we're gonna peel the locusts and get their heads off them.

Then we'll put a liter of water into a big pot and we'll warm it up till it boils. Then we'll get the heads and shells from the locusts and cover up the pot and let them cook for 30 minutes. Meanwhile, we'll put the shrimp meat in the refrigerator.
While cooking the shrimp broth, we will use our time to peel garlic teeth and mingle them with the help of a sharp knife. You can also shredder them if you prefer.
In the case of peppers, we will wash them well and open them to remove the seeds and the vein. We'll get their heads out and get them stung up in notebooks as well.

Finally, we'll care about tomato. We'll also wash and mince them into pieces. Depending on your personal taste, you can remove his skin or leave it (before minting). Then, in the fast pot, we'll add 4 tablespoons of oil, and we'll warm them up at medium-low heat. Once hot, we will add minced or crushed garlic as well as onion. We'll let them cook for 5 minutes, but they'll have to get them and they'll have to get them toasted.

Once our chickpeas are tender and with the right time, we will get our pitted locusts out of the refrigerator and add them to the potage. We'll have them hot up with their chickpeas for them to cook, and that's all. After this, our plate will be ready to serve.

ingredients.item: 1  yema de huevo (para barnizar la masa.)

instructions: En un recipiente, verter la levadura con el agua, y mover hasta que la primera se disuelva. Dejar reposar un momento.
Mientras tanto, en otro recipiente, verter la harina y la sal, y mover para mezclar.

Do a hole in the middle of the flour and add water with the yeast. The following is to mix and mix with your hands up to a homogenous paste (It's not necessary to do this step in a container. The flour can also be passed directly to a table or work surface, or for technologies lovers, make an easy living with an electrical mixer).
That uniform texture dough will have to be added to the oil. Once again, we have to chew and chew, until the fat's well integrated and we get to the point where it doesn't stick to his hands.
Now let's get this mass settled for a resting time. We have to put them on a granate and cover them with a rag and leave them with them for an hour.

After that hour of rest, the mass of the empanada should have greatly increased its size, thanks to the effect of the yeast. Now we only have to divide it into two equal parts: one for the top layer of the empanada and another for the bottom.
Acomodar la masa de una de las mitades sobre una mesa o superficie para amasar. Estirar con un rodillo hasta lograr un grosor uniforme.
Ahora necesitamos la bandeja en la que se va a hornear la empanada. Hay que engrasarla, espolvorearla con un poco de harina, y acomodarle encima la masa que viene de aplanarse con el rodillo.
Con un tenedor, hacer agujeros en esta masa, para evitar que se formen bolsas de aire con el calor.
When the stew's ready (I explain how to do that later), we'll have to scatter it onto that mass cape.

The procedure to extend with the roller shall be repeated for the other half of the mass. The first part will be covered with it once the padded stew has been put into place. The ends of the bottom cape have to be folded to close the set, with a great empanada.
Hacer agujeros con un tenedor, esta vez en la capa de masa superior.
We have an ingredient to use: an egg. With a kitchen brush, we'll use it to "paint the dough," before we put the empanada into the oven.
Put the padded into the oven (preheated) for 40 minutes at 180 degrees Celsius.

how-to-make-green-enchiladas-comedera.name: How To Make Green Enchiladas
instructions: We start our preparations by boilling his breath with a pint of salt till it's fully baked.

We select or process all the ingredients until we get a homogenous green lung.
We cold our corn tortillas till they're golden.
Once ready with corn tortillas, we add the fringed chicken and we stick to form some species of flute.
Finally we place and add green salsa, minced purple onion and minced cheese.

how-to-make-nougat-fritters-comedera.name: How To Make Nougat Fritters
instructions: A bowl pits milk, eggs, vanilla essence, sugar and pint of salt.
Tamiza la harina y el polvo de hornear.
Mix very well till everything's integrated and the sugar crystals have been dissolved.
It crumbles the turron and leaves medium pieces.
It incorporates the cropped turron into the milk mixture. Take some care.
Agrega la harina y el polvo de hornear.
Mezcla hasta lograr una textura densa pero manejable.
Una vez lista, deja reposar por unos 15 minutos.
Pasado ese tiempo, calienta una cazuela u olla profunda con aceite de girasol.
With the help of two spoons, form small portions and drop them into the oil. Don't worry about it.
Fry for a range of 5 by 3 to 4 minutes till well golden. You have to move them to cook them evenly.
Take them out of the casserole and leave them on absorbing paper to remove excess oil.
Fold with glass sugar and will be ready to enjoy.

how-to-make-nuggets-in-an-airfryer-comed.name: How To Make Nuggets In An Airfryer
instructions: Put the ground chicken in a big bowl.
Season with garlic powder, salt and pepper to taste. Mix with the help of a spoon until integrated with spices.
Add the cream and mix very well till a uniform mass forms.
On a plate, scattering wheat flour. Then, in another bowl mix ground bread with paprika.
Fold both eggs into a small bowl and beat very well till they are spreading.
To put nuggets together, gain your hands with some oil or moist with water. Take a small portion and give it how you best love it. It can be croquets, flat pancakes or regular.
Once you have them all ready, pass them through flour, then through the mix of scrampled eggs and finally through the ground bread with paprika.
Take your nuggets and refrigerate for 10 minutes to the refrigerator.
Preheat air frying at 200 ° C
Put chilled nuggets into the frying and cook for about 15 minutes or till they are golden.
Retract from the airfryer and get ready. Enjoy.

Fitted with dough and deposited with a baking paper plate.
Hornea for 10 minutes or till they're golden.
Take them out, let them cool and enjoy.

how-to-make-rice-and-spinach-croquettes-.name: How To Make Rice And Spinach Croquettes
how-to-make-rice-and-spinach-croquettes-.original_name: Cómo hacer croquetas de arroz y espinacas

Season the rice and spinach with salt and pepper to taste and mix very well till everything's integrated.
Corta el queso mozzarella tipo deditos.

Once you have the dough ready, put some oil in your hands and take a portion of rice, form a disc, place a portion of the cheese and cover it up well. Reserve at a plate and repeat with others and book.
Cuando tengas todas las bolitas hechas, lleva a la nevera por 30 minutos hasta que se compacten.
Pasado ese tiempo, coloca en un bol o plato hondo por separado el pan rallado, la harina y en otro el huevo batido con leche.
Pasa la bolita de arroz por la harina y cubre toda la superficie, sacude para quitar el exceso.
Ahora, pasa por el huevo batido hasta que quede bien cubierto.
Finally do the same with the frosted bread. Repeat this process with all the balls.
Warm up a frying pan with enough oil at medium heat. When hot fry the necks until they are of a golden color uniformly.
Retira y deja escurrir en una servilleta de papel.
Now, they'll be ready to enjoy.

how-to-make-sauteed-mushrooms-with-peppe.name: How To Make Sautéed Mushrooms with Peppers and Onion
how-to-make-sauteed-mushrooms-with-peppe.original_name: Cómo hacer un salteado de champiñones con pimientos y cebolla

instructions: Wash and cut the mushrooms, peppers and onion. Be sure that the vegetables are well dry so that they don't release too much water during frying.

Warm up a large frying pan with a high high heat with a tablespoon of olive oil. Add mushrooms and cook them for about 5 minutes, stirring from time to time, till they are golden and have released some of their water.

It incorporates the rest of the oil, peppers, onion and garlic into the frying pan with mushrooms. Skip everything for 8-10 minutes, till the peppers are tender but crispy and the onion's well caramelized.
Add salt and pepper to your taste. If you wish for an extra touch of umami, add a teaspoon of soya sauce in the final minutes of cooking and mix well.
Retira del fuego, decora con perejil fresco picado y sirve caliente.

how-to-make-turkey-and-cranberry-wrap-co.name: How To Make Turkey And Cranberry Wrap
how-to-make-turkey-and-cranberry-wrap-co.original_name: Cómo hacer wrap de pavo y arándanos

Warm a frying pan or plate with olive oil and when at temperature seal the turkey breast from both sides for about 10 minutes or until juicy.
Once ready, remove from frying pan and cut into strips.
Stretch the dehydrated cranberries and also the spinach.
Lava muy bien las hojas de lechuga.
Warm the wrap, place the flour omelette and put a washed lettuce leaf on top. Make a bed with the shredded spinach, then add the dehydrated cranberries to your taste.
Incorporates the crumbling goat cheese and coils up till it's put up and ready. Now, you'll have to taste it.

how-to-prepare-a-delicious-apple-chutney.name: How To Prepare A Delicious Apple Chutney
how-to-prepare-a-delicious-apple-chutney.original_name: Cómo preparar un rico Chutney de manzana

instructions: Vamos a iniciar nuestra receta, cortando las manzanas en cubos.
We will heat up a frying pan or pan and add some water, about 3 cds.
Posteriormente los cubos de manzana y pondremos a cocinar a fuego bajo por 10 minutos hasta que se ablanden.
After this time, we will add apple vinegar or white wine, sugar, cinnamon powder, some salt and pepper to suit.
We mix and we will let cook for another 10 minutes so that our whole apple with sugar and wine will be conserved and all flavors united.
When those minutes are up, put up the fire and finish cooking till our chutney's dry, that's when all the liquid has been reduced and has a creamy texture.
Apagar, deja enfriar y guarda en un envase de vidrio con tapa.
Degusta!

how-to-prepare-ossobuco-in-a-slow-cooker.name: How To Prepare Ossobuco In A Slow Cooker
how-to-prepare-ossobuco-in-a-slow-cooker.original_name: Cómo preparar osobuco en olla de cocción lenta

ingredients.item: 2 pieces of re osocouple (350-400 g each with bone and tetanus)
1  tallo de apio picado en cubos
1 cda de pasta de tomate concentrada
2 cdas de salsa de soya oscura (tipo tamari o shoyu)
400 ml de caldo de res o de huesos casero
Sal de mar y pimienta negra al gusto
2 cdas  de aceite de oliva  (virgen extra)

instructions: Salpimienta generosamente los osobucos por ambos lados.
In an extensive frying pan, heat up olive oil and seal up the osocoups till they are golden throughout. Don't miss this step: it intensifies the taste.
Remove them and at the same frying pan pits onion, garlic, celery and carrot for 5-7 minutes till caramelized.
Add tomato paste, mustard and brown sugar. He's cooking a few more minutes.
Desglasa con el vino tinto, removiendo bien los restos del fondo. Deja reducir el alcohol unos 5 minutos.
Place the osocoups in the slow cooking pot. Add the salted vegetables and cover with re stock. Add soya sauce, rosemary and laurel.
Cooking low (low) mode for 8 hours or till the flesh's so tender that it gets out of the bone with barely touching it.
Carefully remove and stay hot. Fold the cooking fluid and resuscitate it into a pan with medium heat and get a thick sauce.
Adjust salt, pepper and, if you wish, some drops of balsamic vinegar to balance flavors.
Serves the osocouple washed in his salsa. Decorate with lemon frying if you're looking for a fresh touch.

how-to-prepare-shrimp-with-garlic-mojo-c.name: How To Prepare Shrimp With Garlic Mojo
how-to-prepare-shrimp-with-garlic-mojo-c.original_name: Cómo preparar camarones al mojo de ajo
instructions: Sazona los camarones previamente limpios y secos con sal, pimienta, comino y paprika.
A frying pan with medium low heat adds butter and olive oil.
Add garlic and onion and let them drink for 5 minutes or till garlic perfume frying pan.
Add shrimp and cook for 5 to 8 minutes or until they are fully baked or golden.
Add lemon juice and minced parsley.
Disfruta calientes.

hummus-with-roasted-bell-peppers.name: Hummus With Roasted Bell Peppers

ingredients.prep: yellow, and/or orange bell peppers, halved lengthwise

ingredients.item: Sauvignon blanc vinegar or other white wine vinegar

instructions: Heat broiler. Place peppers, cut side down, on a rimmed baking sheet, drizzle with 2 Tbsp. oil, and season generously with salt. Broil peppers until blackened in spots but flesh is still firm, about 3 minutes. Remove from oven and turn down temperature to 400°. Drizzle ⅓ cup oil over peppers and roast until flesh is soft and silky in texture, 20–25 minutes. Let cool, then remove ribs and seeds; discard. Cut peppers into 1" pieces and place in a large bowl. Add vinegar and toss to combine; taste and season with more salt if needed (makes about 5 cups).

Spread hummus on a plate and top with about 1 cup roasted bell peppers (reserve remaining peppers for another use). Top with cooked chickpeas, drizzle with remaining 3 Tbsp. oil, and top with parsley. Sprinkle with Urfa pepper.
Do Ahead: Bell peppers can be roasted 2 days ahead. Cover and chill.
